# Fetch a books resource's relationship | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Device Management ](/documentation/devicemanagement)

- [ Fetch a books resource's relationship ](/documentation/DeviceManagement/Fetch-a-books-resource)

-  Fetch a books resource's relationship 

Web Service Endpoint# Fetch a books resource's relationship

Device Assignment ServicesVPP License Management## [URL](/documentation/DeviceManagement/Fetch-a-books-resource)



```
GET https://api.ent.apple.com/v1/catalog/{storefront}/books/{id}/{relationship}
```

## [Path Parameters](/documentation/DeviceManagement/Fetch-a-books-resource)

`id``string` (Required) 

`relationship``string` (Required) 

 Value: `genres``storefront``string` (Required) 

## [Query Parameters](/documentation/DeviceManagement/Fetch-a-books-resource)

`additionalPlatforms``[string]`

 Possible Values: `appletv, ipad, iphone, mac, realityDevice, web``extend``[string]`

`include``[string]`

`l``string`

`limit``integer`

`platform``string` (Required) 

 Possible Values: `appletv, ipad, iphone, mac, realityDevice, web``relate``[string]`

## [Response Codes](/documentation/DeviceManagement/Fetch-a-books-resource)

` 200 OK``[RelationshipResponse`](/documentation/devicemanagement/relationshipresponse)`OK`

 Content-Type: application/json ` 401 Unauthorized``[UnauthorizedResponse`](/documentation/devicemanagement/unauthorizedresponse)`Unauthorized`

 Content-Type: application/json ` 500 Internal Server Error``[ErrorsResponse`](/documentation/devicemanagement/errorsresponse)`Internal Server Error`

 Content-Type: application/json ## [See Also](/documentation/DeviceManagement/Fetch-a-books-resource)

### [Endpoints](/documentation/DeviceManagement/Fetch-a-books-resource)

[`Fetch a apps resource's relationship`](/documentation/devicemanagement/fetch-a-apps-resource)[`Get Multiple Genres`](/documentation/devicemanagement/get-multiple-genres)Fetch metadata for genres from the catalog by using their identifiers.[`Get a Genre`](/documentation/devicemanagement/get-a-genre)Fetch metadata for a genre from the catalog by using its identifier.
